prediction.reasoning: The prediction incorporates a slight upward drift, consistent with recent short-term market trends for AT&T. The confidence intervals are derived from an estimated daily standard deviation of its price movements (historical volatility of approximately 0.8% daily). This volatility is scaled over the 6-day period using the square root of time rule and applied to a log-normal distribution model to establish the probability ranges.
